purpose: Batch transcribe iOS voice memos with speaker identification, speech pathology analysis, and GitHub automation
cost: $0 - Uses free Whisper AI and open-source tools

scripts.batch_transcribe.py: Main transcription pipeline with speaker diarization

docs.QUICKSTART.md: Fast start (5 steps to first run)

contents.input: Place your .m4a voice memos here (auto-ignored from GitHub)
contents.output: Generated transcripts, analysis, and index files
contents.logs: Cron job logs and processing records

speaker_identification.accuracy: High for 2-4 speakers, varies with audio quality

quick_start: 2. Export voice memos from iPhone to input/ folder
privacy: All data is private. Use private GitHub repo. Audio files never synced.
support: Full documentation in README.md and QUICKSTART.md
